findings.message: FR-W2-002 lacks evidence that the skill emits exactly one ChainVerificationReport matching the Wave 2 schema.
findings.recommendation: Add the ChainVerificationReport schema to the skill and include report-contract tests before declaring T017 complete.

findings.message: No passing evidence links AC-D4-002 to schema tests for checkedArtifacts, traceability, findings, and locations.
findings.recommendation: Run the ChainVerificationReport contract test and record the command output in the completion summary.

findings.message: No feature.json or runtime integration evidence is expected in T017; T018 owns chain insertion after approval.
findings.recommendation: Keep chain integration out of this report and leave AC-D4-004 not-applicable for T017.

findings.message: Rollback is documentation-only for T017 because no chain or runtime behavior changes are made.
findings.recommendation: If T018 is approved later, require sequential chain rollback evidence in that task's tests.
